purpose: Final condition-blind reliability confirmation after preserving the failed uncalibrated and cheap-calibration rounds.
decision_rule: Silently verify each rubric gold marker and forbidden claim against source for each answer.
Treat source-verified factual coverage as correctness; do not reward prose style, length, tool names, or citation count.
Prefer no blocking source contradiction, then higher correctness, then higher change usefulness.
Return tie only when all comparisons are equal.

judges.accounting: reported token usage under the conservative study price schedule

stopping_rule: If raw agreement is below 80 percent or more than one pair requires new adjudication, preserve the failure and stop; do not add another judge round.
